mapper.select: WITH MONTHS AS ( SELECT LEVEL AS MONTH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), MONTH_DAYS AS ( SELECT m.MONTH, EXTRACT(DAY FROM LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || LPAD(m.MONTH, 2, '0') || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS DAYS FROM MONTHS m ), MAINT_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(m.MAINT_END_TIME, 'MM')) AS MONTH, SUM( CASE WHEN m.MAINT_START_TIME IS NOT NULL AND m.MAINT_END_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((m.MAINT_END_TIME - m.MAINT_START_TIME) * 24, 2) ELSE 0 END ) AS FAULT_DURATION FROM E_MAINT_INFO m WHERE m.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND m.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND TO_CHAR(m.MAINT_END_TIME, 'YYYY') = #{year} AND m.MAINT_END_TIME IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(m.MAINT_END_TIME, 'MM')) ), OPERATION_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'MM')) AS MONTH, SUM(RUN_TIME) AS RUN_TIME FROM ( SELECT o.WORK_DATE, SUM(NVL(o.RUN_TIME, 0)) AS RUN_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_OPERATION o WHERE o.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND TO_CHAR(o.WORK_DATE, 'YYYY') = #{year} GROUP BY o.WORK_DATE ) daily_sum GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'MM')) ) SELECT m.MONTH AS month, -- 自然时长：该月的天数 * 24小时 (md2.DAYS * 24) AS naturalDuration, NVL(md.FAULT_DURATION, 0) AS faultDuration, NVL(od.RUN_TIME, 0) AS runTime, -- 故障率 = 故障时长 / 自然时长 * 100 CASE WHEN (md2.DAYS * 24) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(md.FAULT_DURATION, 0) / (md2.DAYS * 24) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS failureRate, -- 利用率 = 运行台时 / 自然时长 * 100 CASE WHEN (md2.DAYS * 24) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(od.RUN_TIME, 0) / (md2.DAYS * 24) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS utilizationRate, -- 完好率 = (自然时长 - 维修时长) / 自然时长 * 100 CASE WHEN (md2.DAYS * 24) > 0 THEN ROUND((md2.DAYS * 24 - NVL(md.FAULT_DURATION, 0)) / (md2.DAYS * 24) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS goodRate FROM MONTHS m LEFT JOIN MONTH_DAYS md2 ON m.MONTH = md2.MONTH LEFT JOIN MAINT_DATA md ON m.MONTH = md.MONTH LEFT JOIN OPERATION_DATA od ON m.MONTH = od.MONTH ORDER BY m.MONTH
